nodes.label: Anti-Thrashing Action Semantics
nodes.rationale: Enforces minimum green time (min_green) and inserts automatic yellow transitions when switching phases, preventing the RL agent from flickering traffic light signals too rapidly.

nodes.label: Max-Pressure Reward Rationale
nodes.rationale: Based on PressLight/MPLight. Minimizing pressure (queue on incoming minus queue on outgoing) stabilizes queue lengths and prevents dumping vehicles into saturated downstream links.

nodes.label: Anti-Starve Reward Rationale
nodes.rationale: Adds a penalty for the worst-starved lane to avoid the agent camping indefinitely on the busiest phase slot where flowing lanes dominate wait times.
